# SCORE Find a Mentor Process

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

SCORE mentor search/request page for finding mentors by expertise, industry, location, and chapter.

## When to surface

The client needs more than a link or article: they need judgment, feedback, accountability, or a person to help sequence next steps.

## Key information

- ## BOSS Library tags
- score, find-mentor, mentor-request, human-referral
- ## Resource purpose
- SCORE mentor search/request page for finding mentors by expertise, industry, location, and chapter.
- ## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
- Use when the model has diagnosed that a user needs experienced human guidance and is ready to request a mentor. For Houston-area users, combine this with the SCORE Houston local page.
- ## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage

## People and links

- Organizations: SCORE, SCORE Houston
- Link: <https://www.score.org/mentors/>
- Link: <https://www.score.org/tx/houston/>
- Link: <https://www.score.org/how-mentoring-works/>
- Link: <https://www.score.org/what-to-expect/>

## Next handoff

Open the cited source link when available and route follow-up to SCORE or the named qualified resource.

## Guardrails

- The BOSS Libraries Librarian retrieves and routes information; it is not a mentor or a substitute for a qualified professional.
- Do not make final legal, tax, accounting, lending, certification, procurement, or compliance decisions for the user.
- Verify live pages for current eligibility, deadlines, contacts, prices, and program rules before presenting them as current.
